HGSS.632.0001:
Hey, is this [0103,0000,0000]?
If you ever end up in my area, don’t be\r
shy, OK? Come on down and talk to me.
HGSS.632.0002:
Hey, is this [0103,0000,0000]?
If you ever end up in my area, don’t be\r
shy, OK? Come on down and talk to me.
HGSS.632.0003:
Hi, this is Buena...\f
Oh! Good morning, [0103,0000,0000]!
I’m kind of foggy in the morning...\f
HGSS.632.0004:
Hi, this is Buena...\f
Oh! Good morning, [0103,0000,0000]!
I’m kind of foggy in the morning...\f
HGSS.632.0005:
Hi, this is Buena...\f
Oh! Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Do you tune into Buena’s show?\f
HGSS.632.0006:
Hi, this is Buena...\f
Oh! Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Do you tune into Buena’s show?\f
HGSS.632.0007:
Hi, this is Buena...
Oh! Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I just got off work. 
Let me tell you, I’m exhausted!\f
HGSS.632.0008:
Hi, this is Buena...
Oh! Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
I just got off work. 
Let me tell you, I’m exhausted!\f
HGSS.632.0009:
Hi...
This is Buena.\f
I can’t come to the phone right now.\f
If you want to chat, tune into Buena’s
Password on the radio and give me a\r
call after midnight!
HGSS.632.0010:
I’m thinking of going to the Game Corner
tomorrow. It’s been a while.\f
You know, I have this great strategy
for playing...\r
I always do great!\f
Huh? Nuh-uh, it’s my secret!
You’ll have to figure it out yourself!\f
Catch you later!
HGSS.632.0011:
Hey there! You use your Pokégear
to listen to the radio, right?\f
I heard that you can even display town
maps with the Pokégear.\f
I have a bad sense of direction, so
the Pokégear would be handy...\f
Anyway, thanks for calling! Later!
HGSS.632.0012:
Is it sunny outside today?\f
When you’re cooped up in the Radio
Tower as much as I am, you lose touch\r
with the outside.\f
It can be boring. Please call again!
HGSS.632.0013:
Oh. Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
You are how?\f
Aiyee! This isn’t the time for me to be
cracking silly gag greetings!\f
The Radio Tower is in deep trouble!
[0103,0000,0000], you’d better be careful!
HGSS.632.0014:
Oh. Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
You are how?\f
Aiyee! This isn’t the time for me to be
cracking silly gag greetings!\f
The Radio Tower is in deep trouble!
[0103,0000,0000], you’d better be careful!
HGSS.632.0015:
[0103,0000,0000]! Hi, it’s Buena!
I got up early, so I decided to call!\f
HGSS.632.0016:
[0103,0000,0000]! Hi, it’s Buena!
I got up early, so I decided to call!\f
HGSS.632.0017:
[0103,0000,0000]! Hi, it’s Buena!
I needed someone to chat with!\f
HGSS.632.0018:
[0103,0000,0000]! Hi, it’s Buena!
I needed someone to chat with!\f
HGSS.632.0019:
[0103,0000,0000]! Hi, it’s Buena!
I couldn’t sleep, so I called you.\f
HGSS.632.0020:
[0103,0000,0000]! Hi, it’s Buena!
I couldn’t sleep, so I called you.\f
HGSS.632.0021:
The other day, I went out to eat with
DJ Ben! Isn’t that great?\f
Not only that, he said the music on my
show is cool!\f
Oh, wow! Like, what should I do?\f
...Oops, I have to get ready for my
show! I’ll catch you later!
HGSS.632.0022:
You know the receptionist at the Radio
Tower?\f
“Welcome” is all she ever says.\f
But she’s really the chattiest person
at the Radio Tower.\f
So she must be holding back.
Isn’t that fun to know?\f
Catch you later!
HGSS.632.0023:
Have you won the Pokémon Lottery
held on the first floor at the Radio\r
Tower?\f
You get more chances as you trade
Pokémon with different friends.
HGSS.632.0024:
You know, last night...\f
I was so stressed out from work, I ate
a ton of junk food!\f
Mary and I have this deal about losing
weight... This won’t do...\f
Huh? What’s her weight?
This has to be a total secret!\f
Mary weighs...\f
Aiyee! M-Mary!\f
Uh... Um... I... Sorry, wrong number!
HGSS.632.0025:
Yesterday, Professor Oak was in the
studio to tape his show.\f
So I went over and introduced myself.
Get this--he tunes in to my show!\f
I hope he’s in again tomorrow!
HGSS.632.0026:
...Cough, cough!
Uhm sorry uh got uh code dite now.\f
Buh uma pro so uh hav to cover id ub
so no un notice while uhm on air.\f
Uh fidz muh voice now.\f
I’ll catch you on the fly. This has
been Buena!
HGSS.632.0027:
Hey, there.
You won that Radio Card by beating the\r
quiz at the reception desk, didn’t you?\f
Guess what? I made up the questions!
...Were they too easy for you?\f
Well, let’s chat again!
HGSS.632.0028:
I’m elated that more people are taking
part in my password show.\f
But when PIKACHU was the password,
it was uh...whew...overwhelming.\f
Fan Club people came out in droves,
shouting “PIKACHU!” over and over.\f
I mean, they were loud.\f
Anyone tuning in around then must
have been shocked by the racket!\f
Anyway, back to work for me!
Let’s chat again!
HGSS.632.0029:
Guess what? The Radio Tower’s Director
is a big fan of TV!\f
A while ago, a fashion show on TV said
that brown suits were in.\f
Now all he wears are brown suits.\f
But it’s a secret that our Director is a
TV fan, so if you see him, don’t you\r
dare mention it!\f
Oh! The Director will be here soon!
Later! Tune into my show!
HGSS.632.0030:
Now, tell me.\f
When do you relax the most? For me, it
has to be in the studio right after my\r
show, enjoying a nice cup of tea.\f
It’s so pleasant that it gradually
makes me drowsy...\f
...... ...... ......\f
...... ...... ......Zzz\f
Oops, I drifted off just thinking about
it! How, uh...embarrassing!\f
Please forget this happened! Later!
HGSS.632.0031:
Tell me, what was the first
Pokémon you ever caught?\f
...Oh, really?\f
I’ve seen lots of Pokémon around, but
I’ve never caught one.\f
I should give it a try sometime.\f
Did you know that the first Pokémon
Mary caught was a DROWZEE?\r
Isn’t that so out of character?\f
But Mary’s DROWZEE kept making her fall
asleep on the job, so she traded with a\r
fan for a MEOWTH.\f
Let’s chat about Pokémon again!
Bye-bye!
HGSS.632.0032:
Did you know...? Ben talked with the
radio staff on the phone for hours\r
about what Pokémon music they should\r
play on different days of the week.\f
Toward the end, Ben’s musical
tastes were kind of impressed\r
upon them.\f
They ended up enduring Ben’s
overenthusiasm for a while.\f
They said they even kind of
enjoyed it!\r
Let’s chat again!
HGSS.632.0033:
I’m going shopping with Mary soon.
It’ll be great if the Goldenrod\r
Dept. Store has a sale when we go...\f
Say, maybe we can go together, too!
Catch you later!
HGSS.632.0034:
Guess what? All of us from the Radio
Tower are going on a company vacation\r
to the Radio Tower in Lavender.\f
We’re wasting our vacation on a trip to
another Radio Tower?\f
I’d much rather go to the beach!\f
[0103,0000,0000], I hope you have enough
fun for both of us on your journey!\f
Bye-bye!
HGSS.632.0035:
Guess what? All of us from the Radio
Tower are going on a company vacation\r
to the Radio Tower in Lavender.\f
We’re wasting our vacation on a trip to
another Radio Tower?\f
I’d much rather go to the beach!\f
[0103,0000,0000], I hope you have enough
fun for both of us on your journey!\f
Bye-bye!
HGSS.632.0036:
Hey, aren’t you visiting all kinds of
places, helping out Professor Elm?\f
That’s so cool. Seriously, I’m jealous.\f
If I ever got a vacation, I know I’d
just go traveling all over the place as\r
I pleased.\f
Oh no! Gotta get back to work!
Talk to you later!
